findings_assigned: Task 2: B2#26 fixture dedup residue (~40-50 sites)
Task 4: A2 W3 hermite quantitative floor

task_1_w13a_retroactive_manifest.notes: Reconstructed W13A status from 35d9c921 + 5c356f6b: OuterLoopState RFECV carve DONE (536->315), _phase_recurrent diagnostic strengthening DONE, 3 other deep carves OOM-deferred.

task_1_w13b_retroactive_manifest.notes: Reconstructed W13B status from 9b75f234: 5 synthetic builders + 4 high-traffic migrations DONE, ~40-50 residue tracked.

task_1_w13c_retroactive_manifest.notes: Reconstructed W13C status from b4bbc62c: pyproject randomly comment + selector_registry strengthening + wrappers_default_args refinement DONE; B2#41/B2#42/A2 W3 deferred to W14B.

task_2_fixture_dedup_simple_classificati.notes: Migrated simple_classification_data fixture (top-level FS conftest) to delegate to make_informative_noise_classification builder; 18 lines collapsed to 2. high_dimensional_data kept inline with documented rationale (legacy x0+x1 score arity doesn't match builder's n_informative coupling).

task_2_fixture_dedup_test_wrappers_check.notes: Migrated small_problem fixture to make_sklearn_classification_df; 12 tests GREEN.

task_2_fixture_dedup_test_wrappers_knock.notes: 5 inline make_classification + DataFrame wraps migrated; explicit n_clusters_per_class=2 added because the knockoff W-sign asserts are sensitive to cluster count (builder default is 1, sklearn default is 2). 13 tests GREEN.

task_2_fixture_dedup_test_wrappers_pr4.notes: 7 inline make_classification + DataFrame wraps migrated with explicit n_clusters_per_class=2. Dropped unused make_regression import. 14 tests GREEN.

task_2_fixture_dedup_test_wrappers_biz_v.notes: 4 inline make_classification + DataFrame wraps migrated. All callers explicit n_clusters_per_class=1 (builder default). Dropped unused make_regression import. 5 biz_value tests GREEN with same recall/lift/cost/stability quantitative asserts.

task_2_fixture_dedup_test_wrappers_h2h_s.notes: 2 inline make_classification wraps in _clf_redundant / _clf_noisy fixtures migrated. 5 head-to-head tests GREEN; sklearn-vs-ours score parity unchanged within eps tolerance.

task_2_fixture_dedup_synthetic_builder_d.notes: Documented the n_clusters_per_class divergence (builder default 1 vs sklearn default 2) in make_sklearn_classification_df docstring so future migrations know which knob to flip when per-feature asserts flip post-migration.

task_2_fixture_dedup_residue_remaining.notes: 5 high-leverage test files + 1 fixture migrated; ~30 files remaining have make_classification imports of which many are dead imports (test_wrappers_audit_p0/p1_extra/screen.py/test_mrmr_integration.py all import but never call). Mechanical drain of remaining live sites tracked for next wave (W15+). Builder n_clusters_per_class divergence callout in docstring is the long-term unblock.

task_3_B2_37_pytest_randomly.notes: W13C b4bbc62c expanded pyproject pytest-randomly comment to document the local-vs-CI mismatch is deliberate; no further action.

task_3_B2_38_assert_eq_true_patterns.notes: Grep found 0 `assert X == True` patterns in tests/. Only 4 `assert X == False` sites; all are intentional with `# noqa: E712` (test_audit_is_vs_eq_truth_check.py: explicitly testing return-value semantics) or pandas Series-element comparisons. No mass-fix needed.

task_3_B2_38_parametrize_no_ids.reason: 12 parametrize sites have ids= (verified-good); the long-tail mass-migration would explode commit count. Cosmetic; tracked for next-wave style polish.

task_3_B2_39_redundant_collection_modify.notes: W3/W11 already drained these; no remaining redundant hooks.

task_3_B2_40_legacy_xdist_markers.notes: W12D a479c1b3 already dropped fast_only + requires_lgb dead markers; remaining markers verified-used.

task_3_B2_41_pytest_mark_benchmark.notes: Grep found 8 @pytest.mark.benchmark applications in tests/feature_engineering/test_numerical.py (TestPerformanceBenchmarks class) - marker IS wired and used. Audit suspicion of 'unused' was incorrect.

task_3_B2_42_thinc_upstream_link.notes: Documented in the shim's comment block: no upstream issue filed against explosion/thinc as of 2026-05-26; recorded the operational test for detecting when upstream fix lands. Per feedback_pr_body_fact_check did NOT fabricate a URL.

task_4_A2_W3_hermite_quantitative_floor.notes: Strengthened the atan2 bin-func discovery test (test_biz_bin_function_discovery_picks_atan2_on_angular). Pre-fix: asserted only the structural family-pick (bin_func_name in atan2/div) without an MI floor; a coefficient-fit regression that picks the right family but emits garbage polynomials would pass. Added res.mi >= 0.15 floor matching measured 0.25-0.35 range with wide shared-runner-noise margin. Verified GREEN under standard pytest run (1 test, 10.96s).

lessons: make_sklearn_classification_df builder default n_clusters_per_class=1 differs from sklearn's default n_clusters_per_class=2; documented in builder docstring. Migrations that hit per-feature W-sign / recall floors must pass n_clusters_per_class=2 explicitly.

make_informative_noise_classification couples score arity to n_informative (e.g. n_informative=3 uses 3-term score). Fixtures with legacy mismatched score-arity (high_dimensional_data: 2-term score + 3 informative cols) cannot drop-in migrate without changing y.
